title: United States commemorates the 250th anniversary of independence amid celebrations and political messages
summary: President Trump launches new official accounts, Japanese Prime Minister Takichi sends congratulations, and financial markets observe the anniversary.

title: Bitcoin plummets 20% and cryptocurrencies face a bearish cycle, analysts say
summary: The price of Bitcoin falls sharply in the last 30 days as specialized press forecasts a bearish trend for the next six months.

title: Divergent outlooks for oil: Iranian conflict, Goldman Sachs optimism, and Citi warning
summary: While geopolitical tension boosts demand for metals, Goldman Sachs maintains its confidence in crude and Citi forecasts a drop to $60 per barrel.

title: Micron dominates headlines: Trump supports it, invests 1.5 trillion yen in Japan, and Burry bets against it
summary: The memory chip maker receives praise from former President Trump, announces a massive investment in Hiroshima, and investor Michael Burry reveals a short position.

title: European indices reach new highs: DAX targets 26,000 points and Ibex 35 seeks 20,000
summary: The German DAX continues its rally towards 26,000 points while the Ibex 35 posts four consecutive weeks of gains and approaches the psychological level of 20,000.

title: Mixed signals on Wall Street: S&P 500 gains 10% but warnings of a correction grow
summary: Dow Jones futures point upward driven by artificial intelligence, the S&P 500 accumulates a double-digit return, but some analysts warn that optimism may be hiding an upcoming correction.

summary: Two companies with high dividend yields have been removed from the index, and analysts debate whether they are now a bargain or a risk.

title: Target at all-time highs: is it better to buy Target or a combination of Costco and Walmart?
summary: Target reaches a record price and investors compare its potential against an equally split portfolio of Costco and Walmart.

title: State Street vs. iShares: which consumer staples ETF offers better value?
summary: Investors compare two exchange-traded funds from the consumer staples sector to determine which has the best valuation.

title: Meta experiences high volatility: rises 9% on cloud news and falls 5% after Zuckerberg's comments on AI
summary: Meta shares show strong swings driven by news about its cloud business and statements by its CEO on artificial intelligence.

title: Doubts about D-Wave and the QTUM ETF for investing in quantum computing
summary: While questioning whether D-Wave is a good buy, an investor warns that the QTUM ETF is not suitable for betting on the quantum sector.

title: Infrastructure for artificial intelligence attracts investments in data centers and electrical contractors
summary: Data center stocks are recommended for July, while an electrical contracting company adds 700 jobs per month to build the necessary network for AI.

title: Retirement planning: retiring on the Costa del Sol with 35,000 euros and how to make savings last 30 years
summary: Two articles offer tips for a quiet retirement: one suggests moving to Spain on a tight budget and another teaches how to stretch savings over three decades.

title: U.S. Congress advances the Clarity Act, which would boost Ethereum as the best crypto investment of the summer
summary: The legislative proposal seeks to provide regulatory clarity to the crypto market and analysts point to Ethereum as the main beneficiary.

title: Alphabet joins the Dow Jones, but other index stocks offer better dividends in July
summary: Google's parent company enters the select stock index, although experts recommend three other Dow stocks with higher dividend yields.

summary: After the group stage, the draw for the knockout rounds of the FIFA World Cup leaves notable matchups such as the Iberian duel.

title: Ohtani allows three runs and leaves due to right arm discomfort; Okamoto gets a hit

title: Continental sells its ContiTech unit to Lone Star Funds for 4 billion euros
